original_prompt: 给这四个包装（可以改变位置大小不能改变细节），打开的首饰盒——包装盒——里面带有白色泡沫棉首饰盒包装——带logo的包装袋，做一张淘宝主图。下面有三个图标并且带有文案
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Packaging scene, Luxury Commercial Photography style. The subject is a cohesive set of [Vaubel Jewelry Packaging] in vibrant persimmon orange. 
Composition: 1. The tall shopping bag with 'Vaubel' logo stands in the back right. 2. The flat rigid box stands upright in the mid-ground. 3. The large open display box with white foam insert lies flat in the center. 4. The small open clam-shell jewelry case sits in the front left foreground. 
[Background]: A clean, soft warm beige or white studio podium. 
[Lighting]: High-key commercial lighting, soft shadows, accentuating the gold rim details and the glossy orange texture. Ensure the 'Vaubel' logo is crisp.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Text, Center-Product, Bottom-Features Layout.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: "奢华质感 礼赠首选". Position: [Top Left]. Style: [Bold 3D Gold or Dark Brown Sans-serif].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: "支持轻定制 | 现货速发". Style: [Smaller, minimalist black text below main title].
3. **Feature Bar (Bottom)**: A horizontal UI strip at the bottom containing 3 distinct icons with text underneath:
   - Icon 1 (Diamond/Star): Text "精湛工艺"
   - Icon 2 (Leaf/Shield): Text "优选材质"
   - Icon 3 (Rocket/Truck): Text "极速发货"
layout_logic: This layout uses a classic 'Pyramid Composition' for the products to create depth and stability. The tallest item (bag) anchors the back, while smaller open boxes create a welcoming foreground. The 'Three Icons' request is handled by creating a dedicated 'Service Bar' footer at the bottom of the image, which is a standard high-conversion practice on Taobao to establish trust immediately. The main copywriting is placed in the top-left 'F-pattern' reading zone.
